programme.desc: CNBC's Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Bheemla Nayak
programme.desc: A battle begins between SI Bheemla Nayak, a righteous policeman, and Daniel Shekhar, an-ex havildar, when Daniel tricks Bheemla into surrendering to corruption.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: Is Africa's School System Failing Its Youth?
programme.desc: This week's show explores the push to promote African languages in classrooms, the challenges of changing entrenched systems, and the real-life impact on learners. Is it time to rethink how Africa learns?

programme.title: The Best Things You Can Do For Back Pain
programme.desc: A bad back often has no clear physical cause - but what often helps is movement. In Good Shape looks at what actually matters in back training and which workouts make a real difference.

programme.title: Is Africa's School System Failing Its Youth?
programme.desc: This week's show explores the push to promote African languages in classrooms, the challenges of changing entrenched systems, and the real-life impact on learners. Is it time to rethink how Africa learns?

programme.title: Nikola Tesla - Waves Of The Future
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla, born in 1856 in what is now Croatia, was one of the world's greatest inventors. He developed numerous innovations in the field of electrical engineering and was granted over 280 patents, many of them in the USA.

programme.title: Nikola Tesla - Waves Of The Future
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla, born in 1856 in what is now Croatia, was one of the world's greatest inventors. He developed numerous innovations in the field of electrical engineering and was granted over 280 patents, many of them in the USA.

programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max revisit their favourite amusement park, renovated and rebranded as AdrenaWORLD. Unfortunately, the new management is Zombozo and his trio of new henchmen! programme.title: Why, Why, Tell Me Why
programme.desc: The first thing on notices about Yau is his strong hatred for mahjong. He had good reasons: his mahjong-playing mother refused to leave the gaming table to attend to his father who had been robbed. The father died as the result, of course. Being young and fancy-free, Yau goes to the beach with two friends to see if romance should drop on him. It does, and like a ton of bricks because he sees and falls for the beautiful Fong. It so happen Fong is a devoted mahjong player, but she has a sister who hates mahjong, Yau goes all out. He is first snubbed but later comforted by Fong in a gymnasium where he helps her dodge arresting traffic policemen. Fong tries her best to cover her addiction to mahjong and awkward situations come on fast and furious...

programme.title: The Conmen In Vegas
programme.desc: The story to after The Conman, where Dragon's sister Ching went to study in Canada. After King and Dragon defeated Macau Mon, they became swindling partners...

programme.title: She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...

programme.title: E11 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's the magical Pineapple attempting to perform a very difficult magic trick with the help of Kiwi.

programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: E7 - Strawberry
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'strawberry', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E5 - Messy's Lost Balloon
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy loves balloons, whatever colour they are, but what is inside them to make them float up high into the sky?

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E41 - Bin Night
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: E10 - Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: E13 - The Breakfast Badge
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh!

programme.title: E24 - Chinese New Year, Dragon Dance Drama
programme.desc: Kyan's invited to perform a dragon dance for Chinese New Year in Beijing. Glitch decides to build a fire breathing dragon robot for the parade and The Go Jetters need to stop it!

programme.title: E14 - Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: E23 - Arcade Dance Off
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: E24 - Mars As Moon
programme.desc: Mars tries to fill in for a missing Moon, but needs a little coaching from Sarah & Duck.

programme.title: E25 - Delivery
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: E24 - Moon
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: E9 - I Don't Like Bananas
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran visit the art gallery and join a tour with curator Marie to see lots of different types of art. JoJo realises art isn't just for looking at - it's for making too!

programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: E2 - It's Time To Visit The Art Gallery
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran visit the art gallery and join a tour with curator Marie to see lots of different types of art. JoJo realises art isn't just for looking at - it's for making too!

programme.title: E42 - The Mythical Creature Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a hidden book about mythical creatures.

programme.title: E13 - Raspberry
programme.desc: Raspberry sings a song, saying it's cool to be kind.

programme.title: E12 - Pineapple
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's the magical Pineapple attempting to perform a very difficult magic trick with the help of Kiwi.

programme.title: E12 - Pea's Power Suit
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: E13 - Double Doughnut Rescue
programme.desc: Evil Pea plunges Broccoli and Carrot into the doughnut toppings simultaneously and Supertato almost quits being a Superhero when he can't save his two friends at the same time.

programme.title: E7 - Strawberry
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'strawberry', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E5 - Messy's Lost Balloon
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy loves balloons, whatever colour they are, but what is inside them to make them float up high into the sky?

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E41 - Bin Night
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: E10 - Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: E13 - The Breakfast Badge
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh!

programme.title: E14 - Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: E23 - Arcade Dance Off
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.desc: Mars tries to fill in for a missing Moon, but needs a little coaching from Sarah & Duck.

programme.title: E8 - The Mirror Crack'd from Side to Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hollywood star Marina Gregg moves to St Mary Mead and throws a benefit event. When a local admirer dies from a poisoned drink, Miss Marple and the police suspect the poison was meant for someone else and investigate who the intended target was.

programme.title: E9 - And Then There Were None
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert.

programme.title: E5 - The First Time

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: TFC Kids Zone
programme.desc: Fun and learning for pre-schoolers

programme.title: Kapamilya Daily Mass[Live]
programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: TFC Kids Zone
programme.desc: Fun and learning for pre-schoolers

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Kapamilya Daily Mass[Live]
programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: TFC Kids Zone
programme.desc: Fun and learning for pre-schoolers

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: E1 - Shawna Forde
programme.desc: Shawna Forde was convicted for a 2009 crime that resulted in the violent murders of Raul Flores and his 9-year-old daughter Brisenia. She was sentenced to death.

programme.title: E132
programme.desc: A judge lashes out at a defence attorney who refers to his drunk driving client as a hero; a religious leader convicted of sexually abusing minors hears it from his victims; and more.

programme.title: E4 - Robert Hansen: The Butcher Baker
programme.desc: Before he hunted down his first victim in the wilds of Alaska, Robert Hansen was working at his father's bakery in a small town in Iowa, slowly developing an animosity towards women.

programme.title: E4 - Hot Summer Night
programme.desc: One of the summer season's seminal events, the Hot Summer Nights classic car show, rolls into town for a day of fun, but things turn really hot that night when there is an outbreak of bar fights.

programme.desc: After a barrage of gunfire leaves three men dead in a residential neighbourhood, Gwinnett detectives use every available resource to identify the killer.

Driving Miss Wealthy
programme.desc: A man is hired to look after a spoiled rich girl, but is then pulled into a scheme meant to re-evaluate her life.

programme.title: 12 Golden Ducks
programme.desc: Devastated by a love affair, former in-demand gigolo Future Chang retreats to Thailand. Thanks to the intervention of his high school teacher, Future summons the courage to return...

programme.title: The Case - Death Drugs
programme.desc: A young girl died of drug addiction, revealing that a new type of drug is spreading rapidly in Hong Kong, affecting young people. The police take the incident seriously and set up an elite team from various departments to eradicate the entire drug cartel. The team investigated from various aspects of tracking, undercover, and forensics, and finally found that the mastermind behind turned out to be a genius drug refiner.

programme.title: The Case - Continuous Homicide
programme.desc: One night in Hong Kong, a clip of self-immolation began to go viral on the Internet. Before she died, the female deceased muttered words like she had hit an evil spirit. Then she picked up a lighter and lit it. Her whole body was on fire, and she screamed in pain. All the environmental evidence points to the teacher assisting others to commit suicide. The only thing is that he refused to admit murder, saying that he lost his memory...

programme.title: Don't Call It Mystery
programme.desc: One day, a talkative college student with a natural perm, Totonou Kunou visits Hiroshima for an art exhibition, and there meets a teenage girl, Shioji Kariatsumari, who says she is a friend of Garo Inudo. “Would you work for me? Lives and money are at stake. I'm serious.” She offers Totonou a part-time job, which turns out to be related to the succession of an enormous inheritance. Totonou decides to help her out, only to get involved in an inheritance battle of the noble and shady Kariatsumari family, where people have been killed for generations. Multiple dark sides and mysteries of the family are laid out behind the inheritance. What truth is buried there?

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: E20 - Pork Cutlets With Huckleberry Sauce
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make a family-favourite recipe of pork cutlets with a fruity and savoury huckleberry sauce, served with potato salad, broccolini and fresh cherry tomatoes.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: Hey, Babe! With over 13 million social media followers and three billion views on YouTube, online superstar and chef of over 20 years' experience Andy Cooks (aka chef Andy Hearnden) sets two challenges.

programme.title: E11 - Paella Macaroni
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.title: E16 - Crab Nachos And Steak Tacos
programme.desc: Surf and turf is a great combination, but why not make it even better by serving it with tacos? Rachael shows us how to make the ultimate date-night combo of crab nachos and steak tacos.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: After two intense auditions, the actors show some growth. As they enjoy a rare day off, a variety and acting veteran appears as a surprise mentor, offering advice for surviving the entertainment industry.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: After two intense auditions, the actors show some growth. As they enjoy a rare day off, a variety and acting veteran appears as a surprise mentor, offering advice for surviving the entertainment industry.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: After two intense auditions, the actors show some growth. As they enjoy a rare day off, a variety and acting veteran appears as a surprise mentor, offering advice for surviving the entertainment industry.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: After two intense auditions, the actors show some growth. As they enjoy a rare day off, a variety and acting veteran appears as a surprise mentor, offering advice for surviving the entertainment industry.

programme.title: E20 - Pork Cutlets With Huckleberry Sauce
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make a family-favourite recipe of pork cutlets with a fruity and savoury huckleberry sauce, served with potato salad, broccolini and fresh cherry tomatoes.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E121 - The Crew Fixes The Talent Show Stage / The Crew Builds Instruments
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: E811 - Pups Vs. A Neon Humdinger / Pups Save A Royal Painting
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger's giant neon sign of himself gets loose, the Paw Patrol must stop it from rolling through town. // Sweetie steals a painting of the Princess and attempts to replace it with one of herself.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds An Airplane Wash
programme.desc: When Camila's plane gets dirty from leading migrating ducks home, the pups find a way to wash the plane... in the sky!

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds An Airplane Wash
programme.desc: When Camila's plane gets dirty from leading migrating ducks home, the pups find a way to wash the plane... in the sky!

programme.title: E118 - The Legend Of The Night Howler / The Haystack Stakeout
programme.desc: Sam and Kit track a legendary creature who's spreading an unstoppable itch among prairie dogs. // Who would steal a cute forest pika's dry flower pile?

programme.title: E210 - George's Friend
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: E211 - The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds An Airplane Wash
programme.desc: When Camila's plane gets dirty from leading migrating ducks home, the pups find a way to wash the plane... in the sky!

programme.title: E109 - Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect 'Step-Mother's' day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: E214 - Recycling
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: E216 - Pirate Island
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig are taking Peppa, George and their friends to Pirate Island. Grandpa shows how to use his metal detector to find treasures and they all build a big sandcastle.

programme.title: E211 - The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: E125 - The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: E101 - Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E207 - The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whi
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: E111 - A Trip To The Seaside / Ben's Birthday Card
programme.desc: Holly goes with Ben and his family to the seaside. No one packed lunch, so Holly uses magic to make some. // Holly has to make a birthday card for Ben by herself, without magic. When she gives him the card, she's embarrassed that it's hand-made.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E224 - The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: E1024 - Pups Save A Runaway Robo-Chicken Purse / Pups Save The Buggy Trekkers
programme.desc: Digi and Tal's inventions to help a busy Mayor Goodway go haywire. // Mayor Humdinger squeezes himself into the Trekkers' dune buggy race, while his cheating ways put the other racers in jeopardy.

programme.title: E201 - Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E214 - Recycling
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: E216 - Pirate Island
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig are taking Peppa, George and their friends to Pirate Island. Grandpa shows how to use his metal detector to find treasures and they all build a big sandcastle.

programme.title: E111 - A Trip To The Seaside / Ben's Birthday Card
programme.desc: Holly goes with Ben and his family to the seaside. No one packed lunch, so Holly uses magic to make some. // Holly has to make a birthday card for Ben by herself, without magic. When she gives him the card, she's embarrassed that it's hand-made.

programme.title: E111 - A Trip To The Seaside / Ben's Birthday Card
programme.desc: Holly goes with Ben and his family to the seaside. No one packed lunch, so Holly uses magic to make some. // Holly has to make a birthday card for Ben by herself, without magic. When she gives him the card, she's embarrassed that it's hand-made.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E109 - Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect 'Step-Mother's' day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E201 - Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E207 - The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whi
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E121 - The Crew Fixes The Talent Show Stage / The Crew Builds Instruments
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

Lost
programme.desc: The tale of crime reporter Vidhi, who is out to find a missing college student. Her quest reveals the many layers of society that redefine politics, love, and betrayal. Release Year: 2022 Director: Aniruddha Roy Chowdhury

programme.desc: Bad karma chases Raj who's told by a gypsy that a lucky charm will change his life, and when Priya enters his life, he realises that it's true! Release Year: 2008 Director: Aziz Mirza

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E8 - Rheas-Cerrado
programme.desc: Every year in the dry season, as the floodwaters disappear, the grasslands of the Pantanal are home to many species: giant anteaters, maned wolves and the greater rheas- the largest bird in South America.

programme.title: E1 - Australia
programme.desc: Scan the Australian skies, which regularly deliver some of the world’s most volatile weather. Await cooling monsoon rains, watch lightning ignite vast wildfires, and marvel at the ingenious adaptations that help wildlife deal with these extremes.

programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin

programme.title: E22 - A Brussels Town House
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Brussels to discover the renovation of a small terraced house; the ''O'' riad in Marrakech, in the heart of the medina; straw insulation; renovating a small antique piece of furniture.

programme.title: E6 - Snow And Ice
programme.desc: Things take a turn for the worse. During a training weekend, both expedition teams discover the mountains' turbulent side and, above all, must say goodbye to a dear friend.

programme.title: E134
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E83 - Sens (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Sens, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she looks at a vineyard coming back to life and Europe's last oyster shucker.

programme.desc: The Pic du Midi scientific observatory has proudly dominated the Pyrenees, 2,877 metres above sea-level, for one hundred and forty years. Notably specialising in the study of the sun's corona, the site is today open to the public, offering a fabulous panorama and unique experience to all who visit.

programme.title: E134
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E83 - Sens (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Sens, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she looks at a vineyard coming back to life and Europe's last oyster shucker.

programme.title: E6 - Life As The Wind Blows
programme.desc: Julien meets Joanie and Hugues, two former members of the armed forces, just a few days be-fore they set sail for the southern seas. Aboard their catamaran, they plan to spend five years seeking out the finest kitesurfing spots around the globe.

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.desc: Snack on a feast of food horrors from the past: from radioactive energy drinks to scandalous snacks made with Olestra, we uncover the incredible things people once ate without a second thought.

programme.desc: Operation Blue: the German army fights to take Soviet oil fields and the city of Stalingrad, becoming one of the deadliest battles ever fought and a major turning point on the Eastern Front.

programme.desc: While space has always been the final frontier, it's also been an unknowable one that every country has wanted to be first to conquer. Finally, newly released documents give us glimpses into their plans.

programme.title: E6 - Outlandish Inventions
programme.desc: Picture this: a full-body gas mask for babies. How about Smell-o-Vision? Or a robot powered by eating slugs? These are all real inventions, and we've got them covered.

programme.title: E6 - Chasing The Ghost
programme.desc: Lauro kicks Iditarod training into high gear with a 300-mile run on the Denali Highway; Bret and Ivy go from checking traps to hunting moose and take the opportunity to bring down a large bull.

programme.title: E10 - Stalingrad
programme.desc: Operation Blue: the German army fights to take Soviet oil fields and the city of Stalingrad, becoming one of the deadliest battles ever fought and a major turning point on the Eastern Front.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫
